import { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import Loader from 'react-loaders' import { MapContainer, TileLayer, Marker, Popup } from 'react-leaflet' import AnimatedLetters from '../AnimatedLetters' import './index.scss' const Contact = () => { const [letterClass, setLetterClass] = useState('text-animate') const contactArray = ['C', 'o', 'n', 't', 'a', 'c', 't', ' ', 'M', 'e'] useEffect(() => { return setTimeout(() => { setLetterClass('text-animate-hover') }, 3000) }, []) return ( <>

I am interested in freelance opportunities - especially on ambitious or large projects. However, if you have any other requests or questions, don't hesitate to contact me using below form either.

Septi Rizky,
Indonesia,
Pondok Pakulonan, 15325
Tangerang Selatan

septirizky79@gmail.com
Septi lives here
) } export default Contact
